Appearances:

Plaintiff TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORP, is present. Represented by
Attorney MICHAEL ROSSOFF, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant PAUL FORD, is present.
Attorney ANTHONY HECKMAN, representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem ORA PROCHOVNICK, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 502A, for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.

This case settled, the trial date of MAY 16, 2011 is vacated.
